description: < b> Style Note< /b> Beautifully stitched patterns and delicate design detail set these kurtas from folklore aside. Use of bright colours, complementing designs and the ability to retain a quality of elegance in the attire is what makes this perfect traditional wear to work or for functions. Pair them with well fitted leggings and ethnic sandals for a look that will impress.  < b> Product Details< /b> Black kurta, has woven stripes of the same colour in the fabric, a round neckline with a square slit in the centre, intricate embroidered design on the yoke, short sleeves and side slits < b> Material and Care< /b> 100% cotton Wash using a mild detergent Do not bleach Use warm iron do not iron on the print or embroidery < b> Size and Fit< /b> Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M < b> Style Note< /b> Beautifully stitched patterns and delicate design detail set these kurtas from Folklore aside.
